title: Sync ProjectE Knowledge
description: Share/sync ProjectE's EMC and knowledge with your friends!
body: Just install this mod on your server and it will synchronize [ProjectE's](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/projecte) EMC and knowledge with all players in the server.   No need to install it on the client.   **features:** Sync EMC with your friends in real time. Sync knowledge with your friends in real time.     **Developer Socials:** twitter(X): https://x.com/moruch4nn github: https://github.com/moruch4nn
